title: Pence & Moon Collective 500 Pcs Velcro Dots Self Adhesive, 20 mm Self-Adhesive Hook and Loop Dots, Strong Sticky Tapes for DIY Crafts, Home, School & Office Use (White)
features: [ Premium Value Pack ] Get 500 pcs (250 hook + 250 loop) self-adhesive coins in this great value pack! Perfect for all your arts, crafts, and organizational needs.
[ High-Quality Materials ] Made from durable polyester and nylon with a water-resistant plastic film backing. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use.
[ Superior Adhesion Strength ] Featuring high-viscosity adhesive that sticks firmly to clean, smooth surfaces like walls, metal, glass, and plastics without leaving residue.
[ Easy Application & Removal ] Simply peel and stick! These hook-and-loop dots are easy to apply and remove without damaging surfaces or leaving sticky residue behind.

[ Versatile Applications ] Perfect for DIY projects, school assignments, Christmas decorations, and more. Use them for sticking cards, posters, charts, photo frames, or even creating puzzles to spark creativity!
